memoryArtifacts.headline: Rebecca's ancestors
memoryArtifacts.description:
A long time ago, in a land faraway, the groundwork was being established for Reformation of the Gospel, this is the story of two of our ancestors who helped.

Looking back in time, the Cranmer family …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Hatfielde於1464年8月21日在英國瓦維其可爾維洛賀比受洗時，她的父親Lawrence de Hatfield25歲，母親Agnes Marshall25歲。她於1488年與Thomas Cranmer在英國諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1556年3月31日在英國肯特坎特布瑞享年91歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾華亞頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Hatfielde于1464年8月21日在英国瓦維其可爾維洛賀比受洗时，她的父亲Lawrence de Hatfield25岁，母亲Agnes Marshall25岁。她于1488年与Thomas Cranmer在英国諾廷加姆爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1556年3月31日在英国肯特坎特布瑞享年91岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾華亞頓。

nameMeanings.name: Hatfielde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Hatfield (East Yorkshire, Yorkshire, Nottinghamshire, Worcestershire, Herefordshire, Hertfordshire, Essex), or Heathfield (Sussex, Somerset), though not all of these have given rise to hereditary surnames. The placenames derive from Old English hǣth ‘heath, heather’ + feld ‘open country’.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Hatfielde was christened on 21 August 1464, in Willoughby, Warwickshire, England, her father, Lawrence de Hatfield, was 25 and her mother, Agnes Marshall, was 25. She married Thomas Cranmer in 1488, in Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 31 March 1556, in Canterbury, Kent, England, at the age of 91, and was buried in Whatton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Hatfielde a été baptisée le 21 août 1464, à Willoughby, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Lawrence de Hatfield, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Agnes Marshall, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Cranmer en 1488, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 31 mars 1556, à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 91 ans, et a été enterrée à Whatton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Hatfielde am 21. August 1464 in Willoughby, Warwickshire, England getauft wurde, war ihr Vater Lawrence de Hatfield 25 und ihre Mutter Agnes Marshall 25. Sie hat 1488 in Nottinghamshire, England Thomas Cranmer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 31. März 1556 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Canterbury, Kent, England und wurde in Whatton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Thomas Cranmer nel 1488, nel Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 31 marzo 1556, nel Canterbury, Kent, England, all'età di 91 anni, e fu sepolta a Whatton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Hatfieldeが1464年8月21日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアウィロウビーで洗礼を受けた時，父Lawrence de Hatfieldは25歳，母Agnes Marshallは25歳であった。1488年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでThomas Cranmerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1556年3月31日にイギリスケントカンテルブリーで91歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアウアットオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Hatfielde(이)가 1464년 8월 21일 영국 워윅실르 윌루그h비에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lawrence de Hatfield(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Marshall(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1488년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 Thomas Cranmer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1556년 3월 31일 영국 켄트 캉르버이에서 91세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 화엇에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Hatfielde foi batizada em 21 de agosto de 1464, em Willoughby, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lawrence de Hatfield, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Marshall, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Cranmer em 1488, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 31 de março de 1556, em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, com 91 anos, e foi sepultada em Whatton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Hatfielde была крещена 21 августа 1464 г. в местности уиллоугби, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Lawrence de Hatfield было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Marshall, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Cranmer в 1488 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 31 марта 1556 г. в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 91 год и была похоронена в местности уаттон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Thomas Cranmer en 1488, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas.
